visual_description: The scene is set inside a car. A man with dark hair, wearing a black shirt, is in the passenger seat. He has a white bandage wrapped around his right hand and is holding it up to his mouth. In the driver's seat, another man with a shaved head and a black shirt is looking forward, his expression serious.
